title: KissBridge::handle_kiss_frame does not validate ports 2-15
description:
File: rust/lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs
Lines: 265-283

The `handle_kiss_frame` function only rejects PORT_AX25 (0), but treats ports 2-15 the same as PORT_RAW (1):

```rust
if decoded.port == PORT_AX25 {
    return Err(BridgeError::UnsupportedPort(PORT_AX25));
}

// Port 1 (raw): payload is a raw LICHEN frame - parse directly
let frame = LichenFrame::from_bytes(decoded.payload)?;
```

The module docs only define ports 0 and 1:
- Port 0: AX.25/APRS wrapped frames
- Port 1: Raw LICHEN payload

Ports 2-15 have undefined behavior - they will be parsed as raw LICHEN frames which may succeed or fail unpredictably.

Fix: Either:
1. Explicitly reject ports 2-15 with UnsupportedPort error, or
2. Document that ports 2-15 are treated as raw (like port 1)
notes: Commit: 01270e3 (docs updated + port validation for handle_kiss_frame; test now consistent; other changes stashed due to diverged main)
close_reason: Fixed port validation in KissBridge::handle_kiss_frame to reject non-PORT_RAW (including 2-15); updated module docs; tests pass; committed and attempted push
